questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "provide"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "issue"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "award"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "ban"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "passive"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "active"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "produce"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "build"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "invent"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "discover"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "design"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "deliver"?
Choose the best word: Tom wrote the letter. (_____)
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Tom wrote the letter." — từ đúng là "active" (chủ động).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Cars are _____d in this factory.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Cars are produced in this factory." — từ đúng là "produce" (sản xuất).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The bridge was built in 1990. (_____)
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The bridge was built in 1990." — từ đúng là "build" (xây dựng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The phone was _____ed long ago.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The phone was invented long ago." — từ đúng là "invent" (phát minh).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Penicillin was _____ed by chance.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Penicillin was discovered by chance." — từ đúng là "discover" (khám phá).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The dress was _____ed in Italy.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The dress was designed in Italy." — từ đúng là "design" (thiết kế).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The parcel was _____ed today.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The parcel was delivered today." — từ đúng là "deliver" (giao hàng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: These goods are _____d here.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "These goods are manufactured here." — từ đúng là "manufacture" (chế tạo).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The work was _____d on time.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The work was completed on time." — từ đúng là "complete" (hoàn thành).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The house was _____d by the storm.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The house was damaged by the storm." — từ đúng là "damage" (làm hư hại).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The car is being _____ed.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The car is being repaired." — từ đúng là "repair" (sửa chữa).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The book was _____ed last year.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The book was published last year." — từ đúng là "publish" (xuất bản).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The letter ___ written by Tom.
questions.explanation: Passive past simple: was + past participle.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: Cars ___ produced in this factory.
questions.explanation: Passive present simple plural: are + participle.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The bridge ___ built in 1990.
questions.explanation: Singular subject passive past: was + participle.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: English ___ spoken all over the world.
questions.explanation: Passive present simple singular: is + participle.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The room is ___ cleaned now.
questions.explanation: Present continuous passive: is being + participle.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: These goods ___ made in Vietnam.
Complete the sentence: The book was ___ last year.
Complete the sentence: The car ___ being repaired.
questions.explanation: Singular present continuous passive: is being.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: The results ___ announced tomorrow.
Complete the sentence: Penicillin ___ discovered by Fleming.
Which English word means "cung cấp"?
Which English word means "cấp/phát hành"?
Which English word means "trao tặng"?
Which English word means "cấm"?
Which English word means "bị động"?
Which English word means "chủ động"?
